title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Y Combinator's CEO Garry Tan uses Claude Code to rapidly ship large volumes of code while running a startup accelerator. The video breaks down four strategies Tan employs: assigning roles to Claude, running parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before implementation.
